EPG-09.title: COMPLIANCE_HOLD_BLOCKS_BRIDGE falls through to FUNDED in pipeline.py
EPG-09.notes: Fixed: separate equality check for COMPLIANCE_HOLD_BLOCKS_BRIDGE → outcome=COMPLIANCE_HOLD. BELOW_MIN_LOAN_AMOUNT, BELOW_MIN_CASH_FEE, LOAN_AMOUNT_MISMATCH added to decline tuple. 90/90 tests pass.

EPG-10.title: No distinct PipelineResult outcome for compliance hold blocks
EPG-10.notes: Fixed alongside EPG-09. outcome=COMPLIANCE_HOLD added. pipeline_result.py docstring updated. Verification script PASS.

EPG-11.title: Compliance hold blocks don't trigger compliance team notification
EPG-11.notes: Fixed: NotificationEventType.COMPLIANCE_HOLD added. LIPPipeline.notification_service optional param; fires notify(COMPLIANCE_HOLD) in COMPLIANCE_HOLD_BLOCKS_BRIDGE block with BIC/code/class/decision_entry_id payload. Backward compatible — None service skips silently.

EPG-27.title: AML fail-open default — c6_result is None returns True in pipeline.py:291
EPG-27.notes: Fixed: c6_result is None now returns PipelineResult(outcome=AML_CHECK_UNAVAILABLE) — fail-closed. _run_c6 docstring updated. Verification script PASS.

EPG-24.title: Sanctions screening disabled by default — entity_name_resolver=None
EPG-24.notes: Fixed: _RESOLVER_REQUIRED sentinel default + ConfigurationError at startup. 3 test callsites updated to entity_name_resolver=None (explicit opt-out). Verification script PASS. 1343 tests pass.

EPG-01.title: RR01-RR03 (KYC failures) not blocked — receive 3-day bridges
EPG-01.notes: Fixed: RR01/RR02/RR03 added to _COMPLIANCE_HOLD_CODES (agent.py) AND moved to BLOCK in rejection_taxonomy.py. Defense-in-depth: taxonomy primary gate, C7 secondary.

EPG-02.title: DNOR (DebtorNotAllowedToSend) not blocked — receives 7-day bridge
EPG-02.notes: Fixed: DNOR added to _COMPLIANCE_HOLD_CODES and moved to BLOCK in taxonomy.

EPG-03.title: CNOR (CreditorNotAllowedToReceive) not blocked — receives 21-day bridge
EPG-03.notes: Fixed: CNOR added to _COMPLIANCE_HOLD_CODES and moved to BLOCK in taxonomy. Also added CNOR to rejection_taxonomy.py (was missing from Python dict entirely — would have silently fallen through).

EPG-25.title: AML velocity check TOCTOU — check() and record() are non-atomic
EPG-25.notes: Fixed: velocity.py — _ATOMIC_CHECK_RECORD_LUA Lua script + RollingWindow.atomic_check_and_add() + VelocityChecker.check_and_record() (Redis: atomic Lua, in-memory: threading.Lock). aml_checker.py updated to call check_and_record() — deferred record() removed. Concurrency test (10 threads, cap=3) PASS. 32/32 AML tests pass.

EPG-26.title: Human review dead end — PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW has no pipeline re-entry path
EPG-26.notes: Fixed: pipeline.py separates PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW from DECLINE tuple — distinct outcome with override_request_id on PipelineResult. human_override.py adds store_context()/pop_context() for re-entry. agent.py: human_override_decision=APPROVE bypasses review gate on re-entry. Full flow tested: park → approve → re-enter. Pre-existing mock bug (C2 pd_score=1.0) exposed and fixed in test_gap03. 1353 tests pass.

EPG-04.title: Bank's AML system structurally opaque to LIP — no compliance hold register API
EPG-04.notes: Contractual fix only — BPI License Agreement must require bank to provide hold register API

EPG-05.title: Generic codes MS02/MS03/NARR hide AML reasoning and bypass all gates
EPG-05.notes: Contractual fix only — indemnity clause + hold register API

EPG-07.title: RR04 in CLASS_A taxonomy — C7 is the only gate (no defense-in-depth)
EPG-07.notes: Fixed: RR04 moved to BLOCK in rejection_taxonomy.py. Also FRSP, INDM, SMND added to CLASS_C (were missing from Python dict entirely).

EPG-08.title: AG01, LEGL in CLASS_B/C taxonomy — same taxonomy/gate misalignment as EPG-07
EPG-08.notes: Fixed: AG01 moved from CLASS_B to BLOCK; LEGL moved from CLASS_C to BLOCK. Test assertions updated.

EPG-16.title: Default AML dollar cap $1M inoperable for correspondent banking
EPG-16.notes: Fixed: _AML_CAP_UNSET=-1 sentinel in license_token.py; boot_validator.validate() engages kill switch on sentinel — no silent $1M default. Tokens without explicit cap fail at boot with reason=aml_cap_not_configured.

EPG-17.title: C8 token must require explicit AML cap — no deployment-time enforcement
EPG-17.notes: Fixed alongside EPG-16 — LicenseToken.from_dict() preserves sentinel when field absent; boot_validator checks == _AML_CAP_UNSET before issuing LicenseeContext.

EPG-28.title: Velocity cap tracks BIC not economic entity — wrong granularity
EPG-28.notes: Fixed: NormalizedEvent.debtor_account extracted from OrgnlTxRef.DbtrAcct.Id.IBAN or .Othr.Id. pipeline.py entity_id = f'{sending_bic}:{debtor_account}' when present; falls back to BIC-only for non-SWIFT rails.

EPG-14.title: sending_bic is the bank not the end customer — MRFA and PD are misaligned
EPG-14.notes: Team ruling: BIC-level PD is correct by design — the bank is the MRFA counterparty. AML velocity granularity concern resolved by EPG-28 (composite debtor_account key). Documented in constants.py. No code change to C2 PD model warranted without new contractual data.

EPG-18.title: Anomaly detection advisory-only — should trigger human review
EPG-18.notes: Fixed: anomaly_flagged bool propagated from C6 AMLCheckResult through payment_context into C7 _requires_human_review(). bool(getattr(c6_result, 'anomaly_flagged', False)) guards against MagicMock attribute bleed. 4 regression tests added in test_gap_stress_detector.py.

EPG-06.title: PD model prices credit risk but not regulatory outcome risk
EPG-06.notes: Documented in constants.py: C2 prices credit risk only; regulatory outcome risk (enforcement action / sanctions on borrower bank) is out-of-scope pending BPI license amendment. BIC-level PD correct by design (see EPG-14).

EPG-12.title: C1 trained on all failures including non-bridgeable ones
EPG-12.notes: Fixed: c1_generator.py now emits is_bridgeable=True for Class A/B/C and is_bridgeable=False for BLOCK. Field is the subsetting key for bridgeable-only C1 retraining. Docstring updated.

EPG-13.title: tau*=0.152 optimized on mixed population (bridgeable + non-bridgeable)
EPG-13.notes: Documented in pipeline.py FAILURE_PROBABILITY_THRESHOLD docstring: tau* was calibrated on mixed corpus; re-optimization on bridgeable-only subset is pending C1 retraining using EPG-12 is_bridgeable label. Conservative bias documented — defence-in-depth is correct sequence.

EPG-15.title: Thin-file C2 fires on institutional BICs with public credit data
EPG-15.notes: Already resolved by GAP-11 KnownEntityRegistry (known_entity_registry.py) wired into PDInferenceEngine._resolve_tier(). Operators register institutional BICs with explicit Tier overrides. No additional code change required — process/onboarding gap only.

EPG-22.title: C1 training objective should be bridgeability not failure detection
EPG-22.notes: Resolved with EPG-12 — same corpus label fix. is_bridgeable=False for BLOCK events enables training on bridgeable-only subset.

EPG-19.title: CLASS_B labeled Compliance/AML holds in constants but not treated as such
EPG-19.notes: Requires founder product decision — fund or exclude compliance-hold CLASS_B payments?

EPG-20.title: Patent claims may implicitly cover compliance-hold bridging
EPG-20.notes: Patent counsel review — dependent claims and ISO 20022 code coverage in spec

EPG-21.title: FATF tipping-off interaction could appear in patent prosecution record
EPG-21.notes: Patent counsel — review spec language about generic codes before filing non-provisional

EPG-23.title: Expired offer log entries are indistinguishable from funded offers
EPG-23.notes: Fixed: LoanOfferExpiry schema (parallel to LoanOfferAcceptance) with OfferExpiryReason enum (TIMEOUT/BANK_REJECTED/SYSTEM_WITHDRAWN). OfferDeliveryService._expiries replaces bare set; on_expire callback receives structured record. class_b_eligible=False pre-wires ARIA retraining data cut for EPG-19 B1 unlock. Pilot conversion metrics now distinguishable: funded / expired / declined.
